summary: Added the OEM Price Feeds Phase 1 schema substrate as migration 610. The migration adds price-change event rows, item-level diff rows, quote impact rows, impact line detail, and rep-created reprice drafts with RLS policies for service, elevated users, assigned reps, and draft owners.
verification: Renumbered the generated OEM schema migration from duplicate 607 to 610 after tracked migration 609.
Ran bun run migrations:check in a clean detached worktree containing the new migration; migration order passed with sequence 001..610.
notes: Existing uncommitted A7 UI/API work was intentionally left unstaged for later roadmap items.
